system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.tr_thongke_dexuat_chitiet","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_THONGKE_DEXUAT_CHITIET]
(
	@user nvarchar(20)
)
AS
DECLARE @TAM table
(
  [name] nvarchar(50),
  sophieu nvarchar(50),
  noidung nvarchar(max)
)

/*** kiểm tra đề xuất bảng màu ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objColor_Duyet2' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đề xuất bảng màu', sophieu, mucdich 
  FROM tr_dexuat_bangmau WHERE Isnull(bangiamdoc_duyet,'') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objColor_Duyet1' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đề xuất bảng màu', sophieu, mucdich
  FROM tr_dexuat_bangmau WHERE Isnull(truongbophan_duyet,'') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra đề yêu xuất kho ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDuyetPhieuYeuCau3' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu yêu cầu xuất kho',  CAST(sophieu AS NVARCHAR(50)), mucdich 
  FROM tr_phieuyeucau WHERE active = 1 AND IsSend = 1 AND IsFinish = 0
  AND ISNULL(nguoiky, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDuyetPhieuYeuCau' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu yêu cầu xuất kho',sophieu, mucdich 
  FROM tr_phieuyeucau WHERE active = 1 AND IsSend = 1 AND IsFinish = 0
  AND ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra yêu cầu mua hàng ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDeXuatMuaHang2' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Yêu cầu mua hàng', sophieu, mucdich 
  FROM tr_phieuyeucau_muahang WHERE active = 1 AND IsSend = 1 AND ISNULL(IsCancel, 0) = 0
  AND ISNULL(nguoiky, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDeXuatMuaHang' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Yêu cầu mua hàng', sophieu, mucdich
  FROM tr_phieuyeucau_muahang WHERE active = 1 AND IsSend = 1 AND ISNULL(IsCancel, 0) = 0
  AND ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra đề xuất thay đổi kỹ thuật ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objBanGiamDoc' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu thay đổi kỹ thuật', sophieu, noidungcanthaydoi 
  FROM tr_thaydoi_kythuat WHERE active = 1 AND ISNULL(bangiamdoc, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objTruongBoPhan' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu thay đổi kỹ thuật', sophieu, noidungcanthaydoi
  FROM tr_thaydoi_kythuat WHERE active = 1 AND ISNULL(truongbophan, '') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra đề xuất phôi ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDeXuatPhoi02' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu đề xuất phôi', sophieu, mucdich 
  FROM tr_dexuat_phoi WHERE IsSend = 1 
  AND IsCancel = 0 AND IsFinish = 0 
  AND ISNULL(nguoiky, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDeXuatPhoi01' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu đề xuất phôi', sophieu, mucdich
  FROM tr_dexuat_phoi WHERE IsSend = 1 
  AND IsCancel = 0 AND IsFinish = 0 
  AND ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra đề nghị thanh toán ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDuyetPhieuThanhToan2' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu đề nghị thanh toán', sophieu, noidung 
  FROM tr_denghi_thanhtoan WHERE active = 1 
  AND ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
  AND ngayhuyduyet IS NULL
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDuyetPhieuThanhToan' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Phiếu đề nghị thanh toán', sophieu, noidung
  FROM tr_denghi_thanhtoan WHERE active = 1 
  AND ISNULL(truongbophan, '') = ''
  AND ngayhuyduyet IS NULL
END

/*** kiểm tra đơn hàng sản xuất ***/
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'objDuyetDonHang_BGD' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đơn hàng sản xuất',order_number,''
  FROM tr_order WHERE f_cancelled = 'N' AND Finished = 0
  AND choduyet = 0 and ISNULL(bangiamdoc_duyet, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SYS_USER_RULE WHERE UserName = @user AND C_MENU = 'bbiDuyetDonHang' AND AllowAdd = 1)
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đơn hàng sản xuất', order_number,''
  FROM tr_order WHERE f_cancelled = 'N' AND Finished = 0
  AND choduyet = 0 and ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
END

/*** kiểm tra đơn đặt hàng ***/
IF (@user = 'toanvu')
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đơn đặt hàng',maddh,''
  FROM tr_dondathang WHERE active = 1 AND pheduyet = '1'
  AND trangthai = '0'
	AND ISNULL(nguoiky, '') = ''
END
ELSE IF (@user = 'asst03')
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)
  SELECT N'Đơn đặt hàng', maddh,''
  FROM tr_dondathang WHERE active = 1 AND pheduyet = '1'
  AND trangthai = '0'
	AND ISNULL(nguoiduyet, '') = ''
END
	
 /*** kiểm tra Đánh giá nhân viên ***/	
 INSERT INTO @TAM([name], sophieu, noidung)	
 SELECT N'Đánh giá nhân viên cần xác nhận',b.tieude,xeploai
 FROM tr_danhgia_nhanvien_tonghop a 
 LEFT JOIN tr_danhsach_danhgia b ON a.id_danhgia = b.id
 WHERE a.username = @user and ISNULL(nguoixacnhan, '') = '' and a.tongdiem > 0 and b.isFinish = 1
